name: nicholasjackson/opa-rego-language
summary: Rego is the declarative policy language used by Open Policy Agent (OPA). This tile covers writing and testing Rego policies for Kubernetes admission control, Terraform and infrastructure-as-code plan validation, Docker container authorization, HTTP API authorization, RBAC and role-based access control, data filtering, metadata annotations with opa inspect, and OPA policy testing with opa test.
